violations.text: Reduced oxygen packaged shrimp were observed stored in refrigerator. Owner was unable to locate invoice from an approved source. Shrimp was released from embargo and voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

At the time of inspection, shellstock tags were observed not marked with the batch last date of use. Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023

Frozen Seafood Items repackaged in the food establishment are lacking complete label information. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023
